examples: A man in camp took a barometer reading at half-hour intervals.
In past presidential elections, Missouri has been a barometer of the rest of the country.
Infant mortality is a reliable barometer of socio-economic conditions.
Commodity prices, a barometer of excessive money creation, are depressed, except for OPEC-manipulated oil.
For 4, 000 years gold has been the best barometer of inflation, the Polaris of stable money.
